case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHAUNTA HARMASON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUL-14-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HARMASON, SHAUNTA HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HARMASON, SHAUNTA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARMASON, SHAUNTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1134 PALOU AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS OF THE PREMISES.**

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT HARMASON, SHAUNTA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HARMASON, SHAUNTA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-13-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SHAUNTA HARMASON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HARMASON, SHAUNTA
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: *** DEFENDANT SHAUNTA HARMASON MUST PAY FIRST APPEARANCE FEES BEFORE FILING ANY DOCUMENTS. ***
